From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

2003 studio album by Rickie Lee Jones

Professional ratings

| Review scores | |
| --- | --- |
| Source | Rating |
| [AllMusic](/wiki/AllMusic "AllMusic") | StarStarStarStar[[1]](#cite_note-1) |
| *[Entertainment Weekly](/wiki/Entertainment_Weekly "Entertainment Weekly")* | A−[[2]](#cite_note-2) |

***The Evening of My Best Day*** is an album by American singer-songwriter [Rickie Lee Jones](/wiki/Rickie_Lee_Jones "Rickie Lee Jones"), released in 2003.

## Track listing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Evening_of_My_Best_Day&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Track listing")]

*All tracks composed and arranged by Rickie Lee Jones; except "Sailor Song" co-written by David Kalish*

1. "Ugly Man" – 4:20
2. "Second Chance" – 4:53
3. "Bitchenostrophy" – 4:38
4. "Little Mysteries" – 5:01
5. "Lap Dog" – 3:58
6. "Tell Somebody (Repeal the Patriot Act)" – 4:04
7. "Sailor Song" – 5:00
8. "A Tree on Allenford" – 5:13
9. "It Takes You There" – 5:17
10. "Mink Coat at the Bus Stop" – 4:50
11. "The Evening of My Best Day" – 4:15
12. "A Face in the Crowd" – 3:43

## Personnel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Evening_of_My_Best_Day&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Personnel")]

* Rickie Lee Jones – vocals, guitars, piano, keyboards, and [sitar](/wiki/Sitar "Sitar") (on track 4), percussion (4–6, 8), [bowed dulcimer](/wiki/Bowed_dulcimer "Bowed dulcimer") (5)
* [Neil Larsen](/wiki/Neil_Larsen "Neil Larsen") – piano (1, 6), organ (2, 6), [electric piano](/wiki/Electric_piano "Electric piano") (3), keyboards (4)
* [Bill Frisell](/wiki/Bill_Frisell "Bill Frisell") – electric guitar (1, 3)
* [Tony Scherr](/wiki/Tony_Scherr "Tony Scherr") – double bass (1, 3)
* [Kenny Wollesen](/wiki/Kenny_Wollesen "Kenny Wollesen") – drums, percussion (1, 3)
* David Kalish – guitars (2, 4, 6, 10), [dobro](/wiki/Dobro "Dobro") (5, 6, 8, 9)
* [Mike Elizondo](/wiki/Mike_Elizondo "Mike Elizondo") – bass (2, 5, 12)
* [James Gadson](/wiki/James_Gadson "James Gadson") – drums (2, 5, 6, 10)
* [Alex Acuña](/wiki/Alex_Acu%C3%B1a "Alex Acuña") – percussion (2, 9)
* Sal Bernardi – harmonica (4, 8), electric guitar (11)
* [DJ Bonebrake](/wiki/DJ_Bonebrake "DJ Bonebrake") – [vibraphone](/wiki/Vibraphone "Vibraphone") (4)
* René Camacho – bass (4, 7, 8, 10)
* Cougar Estrada – drums (4, 7)
* [David Hidalgo](/wiki/David_Hidalgo "David Hidalgo") – acoustic guitar (7)
* [John Doan](/wiki/John_Doan "John Doan") – [harp guitar](/wiki/Harp_guitar "Harp guitar") (7)
* Craig Eastman – [mandolin](/wiki/Mandolin "Mandolin") and violin (7)
* [Nels Cline](/wiki/Nels_Cline "Nels Cline") – electric guitar and [slide guitar](/wiki/Slide_guitar "Slide guitar") (9)
* Martin Tillman – cello (9, 11)
* [Mike Watt](/wiki/Mike_Watt "Mike Watt") – bass (9)
* [Pete Thomas](/wiki/Pete_Thomas_(drummer) "Pete Thomas (drummer)") – drums (9)
* [Greg Phillinganes](/wiki/Greg_Phillinganes "Greg Phillinganes") – piano (10), organ (10, 11)
* Christopher Joyner – [Wurlitzer electric piano](/wiki/Wurlitzer_electric_piano "Wurlitzer electric piano") (10)
* [Rob Wasserman](/wiki/Rob_Wasserman "Rob Wasserman") – bass (10)
* Philip Cordaro – acoustic guitar (11)
* Mario Calire – drums (12)

Additional vocals

* [Eric Benét](/wiki/Eric_Ben%C3%A9t "Eric Benét") (1, 2), [Grant Lee Phillips](/wiki/Grant_Lee_Phillips "Grant Lee Phillips") (3, 8, 9), [Ben Harper & the Innocent Criminals](/wiki/Ben_Harper_%26_the_Innocent_Criminals "Ben Harper & the Innocent Criminals") (4), [Syd Straw](/wiki/Syd_Straw "Syd Straw") (5, 9), [James Gadson](/wiki/James_Gadson "James Gadson") (4), [Greg Phillinganes](/wiki/Greg_Phillinganes "Greg Phillinganes") (4, 6), Sal Bernardi and Cindy Wasserman (8)

Horns

* [Dan Higgins](/wiki/Dan_Higgins "Dan Higgins") – [tenor saxophone](/wiki/Tenor_saxophone "Tenor saxophone") (1, 2, 4), flute (2, 3)
* Jeff Dellisanti – saxophone (2, 4, 9), [bass clarinet](/wiki/Bass_clarinet "Bass clarinet") (8)
* Gary Grant – trumpet (1, 2, 4)
* [Jerry Hey](/wiki/Jerry_Hey "Jerry Hey") – trumpet and [flugelhorn](/wiki/Flugelhorn "Flugelhorn") (1)
* [Bill Reichenbach Jr.](/wiki/Bill_Reichenbach_Jr. "Bill Reichenbach Jr.") – trombone (1)
* Phil Feather – [English horn](/wiki/English_horn "English horn") (8)

*Horn arrangements by Rickie Lee Jones, transcribed by [Jerry Hey](/wiki/Jerry_Hey "Jerry Hey") and [Dan Higgins](/wiki/Dan_Higgins "Dan Higgins"); orchestration for "A Tree on Allenford" by Blair Aaronson*

Technical

* Jason Wormer, Mark Johnson – engineer
* Joe Chiccarelli, [Mark Howard](/wiki/Mark_Howard_(producer) "Mark Howard (producer)"), Mark Johnson – mixing
